attacking_style: Shows willingness to attack early in stage races with solo bridging attempts to breakaways, demonstrating aggressive racing mentality before key mountain stages.

terrain_preference: Identified as GC prospect suggesting climbing ability, but insufficient comparative terrain data to establish clear preference or weakness.
vulnerability: Crash susceptibility has proven costly at critical moments; eliminated from Vuelta before mountain stages where GC prospects could be realized.
key_patterns: Races aggressively early in stage races rather than waiting for decisive mountain stages.
